        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A, branch_B = clone(field), clone(field)
        branch_A["branch"], branch_B["branch"] = "A", "B" # Bifurcation
        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B]); return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        o = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p, self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p))
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o); return o

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []
        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            o = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p, self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p))
            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o); outputs.append(o)
        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({"field": field, "output": output}) # Runtime Archival

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({"C": C_stack, "m": m_stack, "phase": output["phase"]}) # Event Logging

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        return self.EXECUTE(1, [reduce_density()], [reduce_coordinate()]) # Re-entry

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream) # Runtime update

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output): return "OVERFLOW"
        if detect_stable_cycle(output): return "STABLE"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set": [], "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules": [], "phase": "EMPTY", "patterns": {}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s)
        field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase)
        fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE": self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)
            if gate == "OVERFLOW":
                self.STATE = "SHIFT"; self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
            if gate == "STABLE": preserve_cycle(output) # Cycle Preservation
            continue

# 

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_11:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ",
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ",
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ",
            "boundary": "ㅇ"
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))

        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {
                "status": "EMPTY",
                "N": 0,
                "t_stream": [],
                "p_stream": []
            }

        return {
            "status": "VALID",
            "N": N_valid,
            "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid],
            "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]
        }

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []

        for i in range(N):
            t_i = t_stream[i]
            p_i = p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i)

            C_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "t": t_i,
                "p": p_i,
                "tp": tp_i,
                "token": "ㆍ"
            })

        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack = []
        sigma = init_zero()

        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"])

            m_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "C": C_i,
                "ΣC": sigma,
                "token": "ㅣ"
            })

        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack,
            "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"],
            "token": "ㅡ"
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]

        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"] == True:
            return "CRITICAL"

        if patterns["boundary"] == True and patterns["rotation"] == True and patterns["equilibrium"] == True:
            return "CONVERGENCE"

        if patterns["compression"] == True and patterns["flow"] == False:
            return "PRE_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["flow"] == True and patterns["divergence"] == True:
            return "DIVERGENCE"

        if patterns["flow"] == True and patterns["divergence"] == False and patterns["boundary"] == False:
            return "OPEN_FLOW"

        if patterns["repetition"] == True and patterns["boundary"] == False:
            return "DEAD_LOOP"

        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": [
                "Origin=ㆍ",
                "VerticalAxis=ㅣ",
                "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ",
                "Boundary=ㅇ",
                "Accumulation=Σ(C)",
                "Relation=Point-Line-Field",
                "Phase=" + phase
            ],
            "rules": [
                "ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ",
                "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ",
                "ㄹ->ㄷ",
                "ㄷ->ㅁ",
                "ㅁ->ㅇ",
                "ㅇ->ㅎ",
                "ㅎ->ㆍ"
            ],
            "phase": phase,
            "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)

        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if patterns["repetition"] == True and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_reference_shift_needed(output) == True:
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_cut_needed(output) == True:
            return "CUT_BRANCH"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = clone(field)
        shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ"
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A = clone(field)
        branch_B = clone(field)

        branch_A["branch"] = "A"
        branch_B["branch"] = "B"

        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B])

        return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field)
        shifted_patterns = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        shifted_phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(shifted_patterns)
        shifted_output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, shifted_patterns, shifted_phase)

        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(shifted_output)

        return shifted_output

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []

        for branch in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            branch_patterns = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(branch)
            branch_phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(branch_patterns)
            branch_output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(branch, branch_patterns, branch_phase)

            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(branch_output)
            outputs.append(branch_output)

        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({
            "field": field,
            "output": output
        })

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({
            "C": C_stack,
            "m": m_stack,
            "phase": output["phase"]
        })

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t = [reduce_density()]
        reduced_p = [reduce_coordinate()]

        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p)

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        return self.EXECUTE(min_length(t_stream, p_stream), t_stream, p_stream)

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output) == True:
            return "OVERFLOW"

        if detect_stable_cycle(output) == True:
            return "STABLE"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"
            self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER()
            self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        if gate == "STABLE":
            preserve_cycle(output)

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        validation = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        if validation["status"] == "EMPTY":
            return {
                "minimal_set": [],
                "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"],
                "rules": [],
                "phase": "EMPTY",
                "patterns": {}
            }

        C_stack = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(validation["N"], validation["t_stream"], validation["p_stream"])
        m_stack = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_stack)
        field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_stack)

        patterns = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(patterns)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, patterns, phase)

        feedback = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, patterns)

        if feedback == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field)

        if feedback == "CUT_BRANCH":
            self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_stack)
        self.M_STACK.extend(m_stack)

        self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output)
        self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_stack, m_stack, output)

        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_stream = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_stream = generate_varying_p_stream()

            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_stream, p_stream)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)

            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)

            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_11:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ", # Essential Point
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ", # Accumulation Axis
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ", # Standard Base
            "boundary": "ㅇ" # State Closure
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))
        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {"status": "EMPTY", "N": 0, "t_stream": [], "p_stream": []}
        return {"status": "VALID", "N": N_valid, "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid], "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]}

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []
        for i in range(N):
            t_i, p_i = t_stream[i], p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i) # C_i = t_i * p_i
            C_stack.append({
                "index": i, "t": t_i, "p": p_i, "tp": tp_i, "token": "ㆍ"
            }) # Point Generation
        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack, sigma = [], init_zero()
        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"]) # ΣC Accumulation
            m_stack.append({
                "index": i, "C": C_i, "ΣC": sigma, "token": "ㅣ"
            }) # Axis Growth
        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack, "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"], "token": "ㅡ" # Field Base
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]
        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]: return "CRITICAL"
        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]: return "CONVERGENCE"
        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]: return "PRE_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]: return "DIVERGENCE"
        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "OPEN_FLOW"
        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "DEAD_LOOP"
        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": ["Origin=ㆍ", "VerticalAxis=ㅣ", "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ", "Boundary=ㅇ", "Accumulation=Σ(C)", "Relation=Point-Line-Field", "Phase=" + phase],
            "rules": ["ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ", "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ", "ㄹ->ㄷ", "ㄷ->ㅁ", "ㅁ->ㅇ", "ㅇ->ㅎ", "ㅎ->ㆍ"],
            "phase": phase, "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL" or (patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP") or detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE" # Shift Trigger
        if detect_cut_needed(output): return "CUT_BRANCH" # Bifurcation Trigger
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = clone(field)
        shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ" # Center to State transition
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A, branch_B = clone(field), clone(field)
        branch_A["branch"], branch_B["branch"] = "A", "B" # Bifurcation
        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B]); return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        o = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p, self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p))
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o); return o

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []
        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p, ph = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b), self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
            o = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p, ph)
            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o); outputs.append(o)
        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({"field": field, "output": output}) # Runtime Archival

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({"C": C_stack, "m": m_stack, "phase": output["phase"]}) # Event Logging

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t, reduced_p = [reduce_density()], [reduce_coordinate()]
        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p) # Re-entry

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream) # Runtime update

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output): return "OVERFLOW"
        if detect_stable_cycle(output): return "STABLE"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"; self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
        if gate == "STABLE": preserve_cycle(output) # Cycle Preservation

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set": [], "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules": [], "phase": "EMPTY", "patterns": {}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s); field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field); phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase); fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE": self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)
            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)
            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_12:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ",
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ",
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ",
            "boundary": "ㅇ"
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))

        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {
                "status": "EMPTY",
                "N": 0,
                "t_stream": [],
                "p_stream": []
            }

        return {
            "status": "VALID",
            "N": N_valid,
            "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid],
            "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]
        }

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []

        for i in range(N):
            t_i = t_stream[i]
            p_i = p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i)

            C_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "t": t_i,
                "p": p_i,
                "tp": tp_i,
                "token": "ㆍ"
            })

        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack = []
        sigma = init_zero()

        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"])

            m_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "C": C_i,
                "ΣC": sigma,
                "token": "ㅣ"
            })

        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack,
            "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"],
            "token": "ㅡ"
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]

        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]:
            return "CRITICAL"

        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]:
            return "CONVERGENCE"

        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]:
            return "PRE_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]:
            return "DIVERGENCE"

        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "OPEN_FLOW"

        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "DEAD_LOOP"

        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": [
                "Origin=ㆍ",
                "VerticalAxis=ㅣ",
                "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ",
                "Boundary=ㅇ",
                "Accumulation=Σ(C)",
                "Relation=Point-Line-Field",
                "Phase=" + phase
            ],
            "rules": [
                "ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ",
                "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ",
                "ㄹ->ㄷ",
                "ㄷ->ㅁ",
                "ㅁ->ㅇ",
                "ㅇ->ㅎ",
                "ㅎ->ㆍ"
            ],
            "phase": phase,
            "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)

        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_cut_needed(output):
            return "CUT_BRANCH"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = clone(field)
        shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ"
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A = clone(field)
        branch_B = clone(field)

        branch_A["branch"] = "A"
        branch_B["branch"] = "B"

        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B])

        return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field)
        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        phase_shift = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, phase_shift)

        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift)

        return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []

        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            phase_branch = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, phase_branch)

            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch)
            outputs.append(o_branch)

        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({
            "field": field,
            "output": output
        })

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({
            "C": C_stack,
            "m": m_stack,
            "phase": output["phase"]
        })

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t = [reduce_density()]
        reduced_p = [reduce_coordinate()]

        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p)

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream)

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output):
            return "OVERFLOW"

        if detect_stable_cycle(output):
            return "STABLE"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"
            self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER()
            self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        if gate == "STABLE":
            preserve_cycle(output)

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        if val["status"] == "EMPTY":
            return {
                "minimal_set": [],
                "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"],
                "rules": [],
                "phase": "EMPTY",
                "patterns": {}
            }

        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s)
        field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)

        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase)
        fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)

        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field)

        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH":
            self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s)
        self.M_STACK.extend(m_s)
        self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output)
        self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)

        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_s = generate_varying_p_stream()

            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)

            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)

            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_12:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ", # Essential Point
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ", # Accumulation Axis
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ", # Standard Base
            "boundary": "ㅇ" # State Closure
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))
        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {"status": "EMPTY", "N": 0, "t_stream": [], "p_stream": []}
        return {"status": "VALID", "N": N_valid, "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid], "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]}

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []
        for i in range(N):
            t_i, p_i = t_stream[i], p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i) # C_i = t_i * p_i
            C_stack.append({
                "index": i, "t": t_i, "p": p_i, "tp": tp_i, "token": "ㆍ"
            }) # Point Generation
        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack, sigma = [], init_zero()
        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"]) # ΣC Accumulation
            m_stack.append({
                "index": i, "C": C_i, "ΣC": sigma, "token": "ㅣ"
            }) # Axis Growth
        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack, "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"], "token": "ㅡ" # Field Base
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]
        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]: return "CRITICAL"
        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]: return "CONVERGENCE"
        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]: return "PRE_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]: return "DIVERGENCE"
        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "OPEN_FLOW"
        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "DEAD_LOOP"
        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": ["Origin=ㆍ", "VerticalAxis=ㅣ", "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ", "Boundary=ㅇ", "Accumulation=Σ(C)", "Relation=Point-Line-Field", "Phase=" + phase],
            "rules": ["ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ", "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ", "ㄹ->ㄷ", "ㄷ->ㅁ", "ㅁ->ㅇ", "ㅇ->ㅎ", "ㅎ->ㆍ"],
            "phase": phase, "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL" or (patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP") or detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE" # Shift Trigger
        if detect_cut_needed(output): return "CUT_BRANCH" # Bifurcation Trigger
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = clone(field); shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ" # Center to State transition
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A, branch_B = clone(field), clone(field)
        branch_A["branch"], branch_B["branch"] = "A", "B" # Bifurcation
        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B]); return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field)
        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        phase_shift = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, phase_shift)
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift); return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []
        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            phase_branch = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, phase_branch)
            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch); outputs.append(o_branch)
        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({"field": field, "output": output}) # Runtime Archival

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({"C": C_stack, "m": m_stack, "phase": output["phase"]}) # Event Logging

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t, reduced_p = [reduce_density()], [reduce_coordinate()]
        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p) # Critical Re-entry

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream) # Runtime update

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output): return "OVERFLOW"
        if detect_stable_cycle(output): return "STABLE"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"; self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
        if gate == "STABLE": preserve_cycle(output) # Cycle Preservation

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set": [], "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules": [], "phase": "EMPTY", "patterns": {}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s); field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field); phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase); fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE": self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)
            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)
            continue

# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_13:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ",
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ",
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ",
            "boundary": "ㅇ"
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))

        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {
                "status": "EMPTY",
                "N": 0,
                "t_stream": [],
                "p_stream": []
            }

        return {
            "status": "VALID",
            "N": N_valid,
            "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid],
            "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]
        }

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []

        for i in range(N):
            t_i = t_stream[i]
            p_i = p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i)

            C_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "t": t_i,
                "p": p_i,
                "tp": tp_i,
                "token": "ㆍ"
            })

        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack = []
        sigma = init_zero()

        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"])

            m_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "C": C_i,
                "ΣC": sigma,
                "token": "ㅣ"
            })

        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack,
            "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"],
            "token": "ㅡ"
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]

        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]:
            return "CRITICAL"

        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]:
            return "CONVERGENCE"

        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]:
            return "PRE_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]:
            return "DIVERGENCE"

        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "OPEN_FLOW"

        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "DEAD_LOOP"

        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": [
                "Origin=ㆍ",
                "VerticalAxis=ㅣ",
                "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ",
                "Boundary=ㅇ",
                "Accumulation=Σ(C)",
                "Relation=Point-Line-Field",
                "Phase=" + phase
            ],
            "rules": [
                "ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ",
                "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ",
                "ㄹ->ㄷ",
                "ㄷ->ㅁ",
                "ㅁ->ㅇ",
                "ㅇ->ㅎ",
                "ㅎ->ㆍ"
            ],
            "phase": phase,
            "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)

        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_cut_needed(output):
            return "CUT_BRANCH"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = clone(field)

        if mode == "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY":
            shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ"

        if mode == "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER":
            shifted["origin"] = "ㆍ"

        if mode == "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL":
            shifted["axis_vertical"] = "ㅡ"
            shifted["axis_horizontal"] = "ㅣ"

        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A = clone(field)
        branch_B = clone(field)

        branch_A["branch"] = "A"
        branch_B["branch"] = "B"

        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B])

        return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field, mode)
        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        phase_shift = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, phase_shift)

        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift)
        self.SHIFT_STACK.append({
            "mode": mode,
            "output": o_shift
        })

        return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []

        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            phase_branch = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, phase_branch)

            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch)
            outputs.append(o_branch)

        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({
            "field": field,
            "output": output
        })

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({
            "C": C_stack,
            "m": m_stack,
            "phase": output["phase"]
        })

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t = [reduce_density()]
        reduced_p = [reduce_coordinate()]

        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p)

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream)

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output):
            return "OVERFLOW"

        if detect_stable_cycle(output):
            return "STABLE"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"
            self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER()
            self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        if gate == "STABLE":
            preserve_cycle(output)

    def STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(self, output, patterns):
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL"

        return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        if val["status"] == "EMPTY":
            return {
                "minimal_set": [],
                "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"],
                "rules": [],
                "phase": "EMPTY",
                "patterns": {}
            }

        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s)
        field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)

        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase)

        fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)

        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            shift_mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, p)
            self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, shift_mode)

        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH":
            self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s)
        self.M_STACK.extend(m_s)
        self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output)
        self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)

        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_s = generate_varying_p_stream()

            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)
            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)

            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_13:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ", # Essential Point
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ", # Accumulation Axis
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ", # Standard Base
            "boundary": "ㅇ" # State Closure
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))
        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {"status": "EMPTY", "N": 0, "t_stream": [], "p_stream": []}
        return {"status": "VALID", "N": N_valid, "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid], "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]}

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []
        for i in range(N):
            t_i, p_i = t_stream[i], p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i) # C_i = t_i * p_i
            C_stack.append({
                "index": i, "t": t_i, "p": p_i, "tp": tp_i, "token": "ㆍ"
            }) # Point Generation
        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack, sigma = [], init_zero()
        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"]) # ΣC Accumulation
            m_stack.append({
                "index": i, "C": C_i, "ΣC": sigma, "token": "ㅣ"
            }) # Axis Growth
        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack, "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"], "token": "ㅡ" # Field Base
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]
        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]: return "CRITICAL"
        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]: return "CONVERGENCE"
        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]: return "PRE_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]: return "DIVERGENCE"
        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "OPEN_FLOW"
        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "DEAD_LOOP"
        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": ["Origin=ㆍ", "VerticalAxis=ㅣ", "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ", "Boundary=ㅇ", "Accumulation=Σ(C)", "Relation=Point-Line-Field", "Phase=" + phase],
            "rules": ["ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ", "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ", "ㄹ->ㄷ", "ㄷ->ㅁ", "ㅁ->ㅇ", "ㅇ->ㅎ", "ㅎ->ㆍ"],
            "phase": phase, "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL" or (patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP") or detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE" # Shift Trigger
        if detect_cut_needed(output): return "CUT_BRANCH" # Bifurcation Trigger
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = clone(field)
        if mode == "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY": shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ" # Center to State transition
        if mode == "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER": shifted["origin"] = "ㆍ" # State to Point
        if mode == "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL": shifted["axis_vertical"], shifted["axis_horizontal"] = "ㅡ", "ㅣ"
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A, branch_B = clone(field), clone(field)
        branch_A["branch"], branch_B["branch"] = "A", "B" # Bifurcation
        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B]); return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field, mode)
        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift))
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift); self.SHIFT_STACK.append({"mode": mode, "output": o_shift}); return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []
        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch))
            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch); outputs.append(o_branch)
        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({"field": field, "output": output}) # Runtime Archival

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({"C": C_stack, "m": m_stack, "phase": output["phase"]}) # Event Logging

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t, reduced_p = [reduce_density()], [reduce_coordinate()]
        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p) # Re-entry

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream) # Runtime update

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output): return "OVERFLOW"
        if detect_stable_cycle(output): return "STABLE"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"; self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
        if gate == "STABLE": preserve_cycle(output) # Cycle Preservation

    def STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(self, output, patterns):
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL": return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP": return "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL"
        return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set": [], "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules": [], "phase": "EMPTY", "patterns": {}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s); field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field); phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase); fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            shift_mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, p); self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, shift_mode)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output); self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)
            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_14:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ",
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ",
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ",
            "boundary": "ㅇ"
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))

        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {
                "status": "EMPTY",
                "N": 0,
                "t_stream": [],
                "p_stream": []
            }

        return {
            "status": "VALID",
            "N": N_valid,
            "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid],
            "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]
        }

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []

        for i in range(N):
            t_i = t_stream[i]
            p_i = p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i)

            C_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "t": t_i,
                "p": p_i,
                "tp": tp_i,
                "token": "ㆍ"
            })

        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack = []
        sigma = init_zero()

        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"])

            m_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "C": C_i,
                "ΣC": sigma,
                "token": "ㅣ"
            })

        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack,
            "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"],
            "token": "ㅡ"
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]

        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]:
            return "CRITICAL"

        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]:
            return "CONVERGENCE"

        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]:
            return "PRE_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]:
            return "DIVERGENCE"

        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "OPEN_FLOW"

        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "DEAD_LOOP"

        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": [
                "Origin=ㆍ",
                "VerticalAxis=ㅣ",
                "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ",
                "Boundary=ㅇ",
                "Accumulation=Σ(C)",
                "Relation=Point-Line-Field",
                "Phase=" + phase
            ],
            "rules": [
                "ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ",
                "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ",
                "ㄹ->ㄷ",
                "ㄷ->ㅁ",
                "ㅁ->ㅇ",
                "ㅇ->ㅎ",
                "ㅎ->ㆍ"
            ],
            "phase": phase,
            "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)

        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE"

        if detect_cut_needed(output):
            return "CUT_BRANCH"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = clone(field)

        if mode == "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY":
            shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ"

        if mode == "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER":
            shifted["origin"] = "ㆍ"

        if mode == "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL":
            shifted["axis_vertical"] = "ㅡ"
            shifted["axis_horizontal"] = "ㅣ"

        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A = clone(field)
        branch_B = clone(field)

        branch_A["branch"] = "A"
        branch_B["branch"] = "B"

        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B])

        return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field, mode)

        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        phase_shift = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, phase_shift)

        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift)
        self.SHIFT_STACK.append({
            "mode": mode,
            "output": o_shift
        })

        return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []

        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            phase_branch = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, phase_branch)

            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch)
            outputs.append(o_branch)

        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({
            "field": field,
            "output": output
        })

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({
            "C": C_stack,
            "m": m_stack,
            "phase": output["phase"]
        })

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t = [reduce_density()]
        reduced_p = [reduce_coordinate()]

        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p)

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        return self.EXECUTE(min_length(t_stream, p_stream), t_stream, p_stream)

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output):
            return "OVERFLOW"

        if detect_stable_cycle(output):
            return "STABLE"

        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"
            self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER()
            self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        if gate == "STABLE":
            preserve_cycle(output)

    def STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(self, output, patterns):
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL":
            return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP":
            return "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL"

        if patterns["divergence"] == True:
            return "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER"

        return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        validation = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        if validation["status"] == "EMPTY":
            return {
                "minimal_set": [],
                "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"],
                "rules": [],
                "phase": "EMPTY",
                "patterns": {}
            }

        C_stack = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(validation["N"], validation["t_stream"], validation["p_stream"])
        m_stack = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_stack)
        field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_stack)

        patterns = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(patterns)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, patterns, phase)

        feedback = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, patterns)

        if feedback == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, patterns)
            self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode)

        if feedback == "CUT_BRANCH":
            self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_stack)
        self.M_STACK.extend(m_stack)

        self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output)
        self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_stack, m_stack, output)

        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_stream = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_stream = generate_varying_p_stream()

            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_stream, p_stream)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output)

            self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)

            continue

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_14:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ", # Essential Point
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ", # Accumulation Axis
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ", # Standard Base
            "boundary": "ㅇ" # State Closure
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))
        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {"status": "EMPTY", "N": 0, "t_stream": [], "p_stream": []}
        return {"status": "VALID", "N": N_valid, "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid], "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]}

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []
        for i in range(N):
            t_i, p_i = t_stream[i], p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i) # C_i = t_i * p_i
            C_stack.append({
                "index": i, "t": t_i, "p": p_i, "tp": tp_i, "token": "ㆍ"
            }) # Point Generation
        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack, sigma = [], init_zero()
        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"]) # ΣC Accumulation
            m_stack.append({
                "index": i, "C": C_i, "ΣC": sigma, "token": "ㅣ"
            }) # Axis Growth
        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack, "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"], "token": "ㅡ" # Field Base
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]
        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]: return "CRITICAL"
        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]: return "CONVERGENCE"
        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]: return "PRE_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]: return "DIVERGENCE"
        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "OPEN_FLOW"
        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]: return "DEAD_LOOP"
        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": ["Origin=ㆍ", "VerticalAxis=ㅣ", "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ", "Boundary=ㅇ", "Accumulation=Σ(C)", "Relation=Point-Line-Field", "Phase=" + phase],
            "rules": ["ㆍ->ㅣ/ㅡ", "ㅣ/ㅡ->ㄹ", "ㄹ->ㄷ", "ㄷ->ㅁ", "ㅁ->ㅇ", "ㅇ->ㅎ", "ㅎ->ㆍ"],
            "phase": phase, "patterns": patterns
        }

    def STEP_7_FEEDBACK(self, output, patterns):
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(output)
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL" or (patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP") or detect_reference_shift_needed(output):
            return "SHIFT_REFERENCE" # Shift Trigger
        if detect_cut_needed(output): return "CUT_BRANCH" # Bifurcation Trigger
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = clone(field)
        if mode == "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY": shifted["origin"] = "ㅇ" # Center to State
        if mode == "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER": shifted["origin"] = "ㆍ" # State to Point
        if mode == "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL": shifted["axis_vertical"], shifted["axis_horizontal"] = "ㅡ", "ㅣ"
        return shifted

    def STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(self, field):
        branch_A, branch_B = clone(field), clone(field)
        branch_A["branch"], branch_B["branch"] = "A", "B" # Bifurcation
        self.BRANCH_STACK.extend([branch_A, branch_B]); return [branch_A, branch_B]

    def STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(self, field, mode):
        shifted = self.STEP_8_REFERENCE_SHIFT(field, mode)
        p_shift = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(shifted)
        phase_shift = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_shift)
        o_shift = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(shifted, p_shift, phase_shift)
        self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_shift); self.SHIFT_STACK.append({"mode": mode, "output": o_shift}); return o_shift

    def STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(self, field):
        outputs = []
        for b in self.STEP_9_CUT_BRANCH(field):
            p_branch = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(b)
            phase_branch = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p_branch)
            o_branch = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(b, p_branch, phase_branch)
            self.PATTERN_STACK.append(o_branch); outputs.append(o_branch)
        return outputs

    def STEP_12_ARCHIVE(self, field, output):
        self.FIELD_STACK.append({"field": field, "output": output}) # Runtime Archival

    def STEP_13_RECORD(self, C_stack, m_stack, output):
        self.RUNTIME_STACK.append({"C": C_stack, "m": m_stack, "phase": output["phase"]}) # Event Logging

    def STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(self):
        reduced_t, reduced_p = [reduce_density()], [reduce_coordinate()]
        return self.EXECUTE(1, reduced_t, reduced_p) # Critical Re-entry

    def STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(self, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_runtime = min_length(t_stream, p_stream)
        return self.EXECUTE(N_runtime, t_stream, p_stream) # Runtime update

    def STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(self, output):
        if detect_overflow(output): return "OVERFLOW"
        if detect_stable_cycle(output): return "STABLE"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(self, gate, output):
        if gate == "OVERFLOW":
            self.STATE = "SHIFT"; self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
        if gate == "STABLE": preserve_cycle(output) # Cycle Preservation

    def STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(self, output, patterns):
        if output["phase"] == "CRITICAL": return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"
        if patterns["repetition"] and output["phase"] == "DEAD_LOOP": return "VERTICAL_TO_HORIZONTAL"
        if patterns["divergence"]: return "BOUNDARY_TO_CENTER" # Corrective Shift
        return "CENTER_TO_BOUNDARY"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set": [], "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules": [], "phase": "EMPTY", "patterns": {}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s); field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        p = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field); phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(p)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, p, phase); fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, p)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, p); self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s)
            gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output); self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)
            continue



# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_15:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ", "ㅡ", "ㅣ", "ㅇ", "ㄷ", "ㅎ", "ㄹ", "ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.BRANCH_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []

        self.REFERENCE = {
            "origin": "ㆍ",
            "axis_vertical": "ㅣ",
            "axis_horizontal": "ㅡ",
            "boundary": "ㅇ"
        }

    def STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        N_valid = min(N, length(t_stream), length(p_stream))

        if N_valid <= 0:
            return {
                "status": "EMPTY",
                "N": 0,
                "t_stream": [],
                "p_stream": []
            }

        return {
            "status": "VALID",
            "N": N_valid,
            "t_stream": t_stream[0:N_valid],
            "p_stream": p_stream[0:N_valid]
        }

    def STEP_1_EXPAND_C(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        C_stack = []

        for i in range(N):
            t_i = t_stream[i]
            p_i = p_stream[i]
            tp_i = multiply(t_i, p_i)

            C_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "t": t_i,
                "p": p_i,
                "tp": tp_i,
                "token": "ㆍ"
            })

        return C_stack

    def STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(self, C_stack):
        m_stack = []
        sigma = init_zero()

        for i in range(length(C_stack)):
            C_i = C_stack[i]
            sigma = add(sigma, C_i["tp"])

            m_stack.append({
                "index": i,
                "C": C_i,
                "ΣC": sigma,
                "token": "ㅣ"
            })

        return m_stack

    def STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(self, m_stack):
        return {
            "mode": "VERTICAL_STACK",
            "layers": m_stack,
            "origin": self.REFERENCE["origin"],
            "axis_vertical": self.REFERENCE["axis_vertical"],
            "axis_horizontal": self.REFERENCE["axis_horizontal"],
            "boundary": self.REFERENCE["boundary"],
            "token": "ㅡ"
        }

    def STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(self, field):
        layers = field["layers"]

        return {
            "repetition": detect_repetition(layers),
            "symmetry_vertical": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_vertical"]),
            "symmetry_horizontal": check_axis_symmetry(layers, axis=field["axis_horizontal"]),
            "boundary": detect_boundary(layers, token=field["boundary"]),
            "flow": detect_flow(layers, token="ㄹ"),
            "closure": detect_closure(layers, token="ㅁ"),
            "rotation": detect_rotation(layers, token="ㅎ"),
            "compression": detect_compression(layers, token="ㄷ"),
            "divergence": detect_divergence(layers),
            "density": detect_density(layers),
            "equilibrium": detect_equilibrium(layers),
            "singularity": detect_singularity(layers)
        }

    def STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(self, patterns):
        if patterns["singularity"]:
            return "CRITICAL"

        if patterns["boundary"] and patterns["rotation"] and patterns["equilibrium"]:
            return "CONVERGENCE"

        if patterns["compression"] and not patterns["flow"]:
            return "PRE_BOUNDARY"

        if patterns["flow"] and patterns["divergence"]:
            return "DIVERGENCE"

        if patterns["flow"] and not patterns["divergence"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "OPEN_FLOW"

        if patterns["repetition"] and not patterns["boundary"]:
            return "DEAD_LOOP"

        return "TRANSITION"

    def STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(self, field, patterns, phase):
        return {
            "minimal_set": extract_tokens(self.SYMBOLS, field, patterns),
            "invariants": [
                "Origin=ㆍ",
                "VerticalAxis=ㅣ",
                "HorizontalAxis=ㅡ",
                "Boundary=ㅇ",
                "Accumulation=Σ(C)",
                "Relation=Point-Line-Field",
                "Phase=" + phase
            ],
