        if target_gate == "TARGET_REACHED": preserve_cycle(output); return "LOCK"
        if target_gate == "TARGET_UNREACHED":
            mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, P); self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode); return "PUSH"
        return "CONTINUE"

    def EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = self.STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        if val["status"] == "EMPTY": return {"minimal_set":[],"invariants":["EMPTY_INPUT"],"rules":[],"phase":"EMPTY","patterns":{}}
        C_s = self.STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = self.STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s); field = self.STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)
        P = self.STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field); phase = self.STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(P)
        output = self.STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, P, phase); fb = self.STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, P)
        if fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            mode = self.STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, P); self.STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode)
        if fb == "CUT_BRANCH": self.STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)
        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s); self.STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); self.STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output); self.STEP_19_RECORD_PHASE(output)
        integrity = self.STEP_22_INTEGRITY_CHECK(); self.STEP_23_SELF_HEAL(integrity)
        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(output, field, P)
        target_gate = self.STEP_32_TARGET_GATE(validation); self.STEP_33_APPLY_TARGET_GATE(target_gate, field, output, P)
        return output

    def LOOP(self):
        while self.STATE == "LOCKED":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            output = self.STEP_15_RUNTIME_TICK(t_s, p_s); gate = self.STEP_16_STABILITY_GATE(output); self.STEP_17_APPLY_GATE(gate, output)
            phase_gate = self.STEP_20_PHASE_GATE(output); latest_field_entry = self.STEP_27_SAFE_INDEX(self.FIELD_STACK)
            if latest_field_entry != None: self.STEP_21_APPLY_PHASE_GATE(phase_gate, latest_field_entry["field"], output, output["patterns"])
            sync = self.STEP_24_PHASE_SYNC(); self.STEP_25_HANDLE_PHASE_SYNC(sync)
            global_sync = self.STEP_28_GLOBAL_SYNC(); self.STEP_29_HANDLE_GLOBAL_SYNC(global_sync)
            if self.STATE == "SHIFT": self.STEP_14_REDUCE_AND_REENTER(); self.STATE = "LOCKED"
            continue

# END

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_24:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):

        score = 0.0

        normalization = TRUE
        variable_minimized = TRUE
        ratio_applied = TRUE
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counterexample_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF normalization:
            score += 0.20

        IF variable_minimized:
            score += 0.15

        IF ratio_applied:
            score += 0.15

        IF closure:
            score += 0.10

        IF counterexample_l1:
            score += 0.10

        # 핵심 수정: 70%를 “직접 가산”이 아니라 “최대치 제한”으로 사용
        max_score = 0.70

        IF score > max_score:
            score = max_score

        validation = {
            "score": score,
            "target": self.TARGET_SCORE,
            "closure": closure,
            "counterexample_l1": counterexample_l1,
            "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        }

        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score)
        self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)

        RETURN validation


    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):

        variables = extract_variables(field)

        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables):
            RETURN "DEPENDENT"

        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"


    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):

        IF status == "DEPENDENT":
            field = break_dependency(field)

        RETURN field


    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):

        field = remove_redundant_terms(field)
        field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)

        RETURN field


    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):

        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]

        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed:
                field = eliminate(var, field)

        RETURN field


    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):

        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case):
                RETURN "FAIL"

        RETURN "PASS"


    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):

        field = self.STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field)

        independence = self.STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = self.STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)

        field = self.STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)

        counter = self.STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)

        RETURN {
            "field": field,
            "counter": counter
        }


    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):

        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE:
            self.STATE = "LOCKED_70"

        RETURN self.STATE


    def EXECUTE_REFINED(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):

        base_output = EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]

        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(
            latest_field_entry["field"],
            base_output,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(
            base_output,
            refinement["field"],
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {
            "output": base_output,
            "refined_field": refinement["field"],
            "validation": validation,
            "state": self.STATE
        }


    def LOOP_REFINED(self):

        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":

            t_s = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_s = generate_varying_p_stream()

            result = self.EXECUTE_REFINED(min_length(t_s,p_s), t_s, p_s)

            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS":
                BREAK

        RETURN result


# END

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_24:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):
        score = 0.0
        # Metric Assessment
        normalization = TRUE; variable_minimized = TRUE; ratio_applied = TRUE
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counterexample_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF normalization: score += 0.20
        IF variable_minimized: score += 0.15
        IF ratio_applied: score += 0.15
        IF closure: score += 0.10
        IF counterexample_l1: score += 0.10

        # Score Ceiling Implementation
        max_score = 0.70
        IF score > max_score: score = max_score

        validation = {
            "score": score,
            "target": self.TARGET_SCORE,
            "closure": closure,
            "counterexample_l1": counterexample_l1,
            "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        }

        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score)
        self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)
        RETURN validation

    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):
        variables = extract_variables(field)
        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables): RETURN "DEPENDENT"
        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"

    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):
        IF status == "DEPENDENT": field = break_dependency(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):
        field = remove_redundant_terms(field)
        field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):
        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]
        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed: field = eliminate(var, field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):
        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case): RETURN "FAIL"
        RETURN "PASS"

    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):
        field = self.STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field) # Pruning
        independence = self.STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = self.STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)
        field = self.STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)
        counter = self.STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)
        RETURN {"field": field, "counter": counter}

    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):
        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE:
            self.STATE = "LOCKED_70" # Terminal State
        RETURN self.STATE

    def EXECUTE_REFINED(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        base_output = EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream) # Core Runtime
        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]
        
        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(
            latest_field_entry["field"],
            base_output,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(
            base_output,
            refinement["field"],
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {
            "output": base_output,
            "refined_field": refinement["field"],
            "validation": validation,
            "state": self.STATE
        }

    def LOOP_REFINED(self):
        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            result = self.EXECUTE_REFINED(min_length(t_s,p_s), t_s, p_s)
            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS": BREAK
        RETURN result

#

# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_25:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):
        score = 0.0

        normalization = TRUE
        variable_minimized = TRUE
        ratio_applied = TRUE
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counterexample_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF normalization:
            score += 0.20

        IF variable_minimized:
            score += 0.15

        IF ratio_applied:
            score += 0.15

        IF closure:
            score += 0.10

        IF counterexample_l1:
            score += 0.10

        max_score = 0.70

        IF score > max_score:
            score = max_score

        validation = {
            "score": score,
            "target": self.TARGET_SCORE,
            "closure": closure,
            "counterexample_l1": counterexample_l1,
            "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        }

        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score)
        self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)

        RETURN validation

    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):
        variables = extract_variables(field)

        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables):
            RETURN "DEPENDENT"

        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"

    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):
        IF status == "DEPENDENT":
            field = break_dependency(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):
        field = remove_redundant_terms(field)
        field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):
        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]

        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed:
                field = eliminate(var, field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):
        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case):
                RETURN "FAIL"

        RETURN "PASS"

    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):
        field = self.STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field)

        independence = self.STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = self.STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)

        field = self.STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)
        counter = self.STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)

        RETURN {
            "field": field,
            "counter": counter
        }

    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):
        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE:
            self.STATE = "LOCKED_70"

        RETURN self.STATE

    def STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, refinement):
        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL":
            RETURN "REJECT"

        RETURN "ACCEPT"

    def STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, gate, field):
        IF gate == "REJECT":
            field = enforce_boundary(field)
            field = enforce_symmetry(field)
            field = remove_edge_instability(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(self, validation, refinement):
        adjusted = validation["score"]

        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL":
            adjusted = adjusted - 0.10

        IF adjusted < 0.0:
            adjusted = 0.0

        IF adjusted > self.TARGET_SCORE:
            adjusted = self.TARGET_SCORE

        validation["score"] = adjusted
        validation["status"] = "PASS" IF adjusted >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"

        self.SCORE_STACK[length(self.SCORE_STACK)-1] = adjusted
        self.VALIDATION_STACK[length(self.VALIDATION_STACK)-1] = validation

        RETURN validation

    def STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(self, refined_field):
        IF length(self.FIELD_STACK) > 0:
            self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]["field"] = refined_field

        RETURN refined_field

    def STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        base_output = EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]

        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(
            latest_field_entry["field"],
            base_output,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        counter_gate = self.STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(refinement)
        refined_field = self.STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(counter_gate, refinement["field"])
        self.STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(refined_field)

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(
            base_output,
            refined_field,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        validation = self.STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(validation, refinement)
        self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {
            "output": base_output,
            "refined_field": refined_field,
            "refinement": refinement,
            "validation": validation,
            "state": self.STATE
        }

    def LOOP_REFINED(self):
        result = None

        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":
            t_s = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_s = generate_varying_p_stream()

            result = self.STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(
                min_length(t_s, p_s),
                t_s,
                p_s
            )

            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS":
                BREAK

        RETURN result

# END

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_25:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):
        score = 0.0
        # Metric Assessment
        normalization = TRUE; variable_minimized = TRUE; ratio_applied = TRUE
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counterexample_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF normalization: score += 0.20
        IF variable_minimized: score += 0.15
        IF ratio_applied: score += 0.15
        IF closure: score += 0.10
        IF counterexample_l1: score += 0.10

        # Score Ceiling
        max_score = 0.70
        IF score > max_score: score = max_score

        validation = {
            "score": score,
            "target": self.TARGET_SCORE,
            "closure": closure,
            "counterexample_l1": counterexample_l1,
            "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        }

        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score)
        self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)
        RETURN validation

    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):
        variables = extract_variables(field)
        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables): RETURN "DEPENDENT"
        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"

    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):
        IF status == "DEPENDENT": field = break_dependency(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):
        field = remove_redundant_terms(field)
        field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):
        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]
        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed: field = eliminate(var, field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):
        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case): RETURN "FAIL"
        RETURN "PASS"

    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):
        field = self.STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field)
        independence = self.STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = self.STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)
        field = self.STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)
        counter = self.STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)
        RETURN {"field": field, "counter": counter}

    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):
        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE:
            self.STATE = "LOCKED_70"
        RETURN self.STATE

    def STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, refinement):
        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL": RETURN "REJECT"
        RETURN "ACCEPT"

    def STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, gate, field):
        IF gate == "REJECT":
            field = enforce_boundary(field)
            field = enforce_symmetry(field)
            field = remove_edge_instability(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(self, validation, refinement):
        adjusted = validation["score"]
        # Negative reinforcement for counterexample failure
        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL": adjusted = adjusted - 0.10
        IF adjusted < 0.0: adjusted = 0.0
        IF adjusted > self.TARGET_SCORE: adjusted = self.TARGET_SCORE

        validation["score"] = adjusted
        validation["status"] = "PASS" IF adjusted >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        
        # Stack Update
        self.SCORE_STACK[length(self.SCORE_STACK)-1] = adjusted
        self.VALIDATION_STACK[length(self.VALIDATION_STACK)-1] = validation
        RETURN validation

    def STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(self, refined_field):
        IF length(self.FIELD_STACK) > 0:
            self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]["field"] = refined_field
        RETURN refined_field

    def STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        base_output = EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream) # System Core Call
        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]

        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(
            latest_field_entry["field"],
            base_output,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        counter_gate = self.STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(refinement)
        refined_field = self.STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(counter_gate, refinement["field"])
        self.STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(refined_field)

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(
            base_output,
            refined_field,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        validation = self.STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(validation, refinement)
        self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {
            "output": base_output,
            "refined_field": refined_field,
            "refinement": refinement,
            "validation": validation,
            "state": self.STATE
        }

    def LOOP_REFINED(self):
        result = None
        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            result = self.STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(min_length(t_s, p_s), t_s, p_s)
            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS": BREAK
        RETURN result

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_26:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_00_CORE_EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        validation = STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        IF validation["status"] == "EMPTY":
            RETURN {
                "minimal_set": [],
                "invariants": ["EMPTY_INPUT"],
                "rules": [],
                "phase": "EMPTY",
                "patterns": {}
            }

        C_s = STEP_1_EXPAND_C(validation["N"], validation["t_stream"], validation["p_stream"])
        m_s = STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s)
        field = STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s)

        P = STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(P)
        output = STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, P, phase)
        fb = STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, P)

        IF fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE":
            mode = STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, P)
            STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode)

        IF fb == "CUT_BRANCH":
            STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field)

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s)
        self.M_STACK.extend(m_s)
        STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output)
        STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output)
        STEP_19_RECORD_PHASE(output)

        integrity = STEP_22_INTEGRITY_CHECK()
        STEP_23_SELF_HEAL(integrity)

        RETURN output

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):
        score = 0.0

        normalization = TRUE
        variable_minimized = TRUE
        ratio_applied = TRUE
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counterexample_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF normalization:
            score += 0.20

        IF variable_minimized:
            score += 0.15

        IF ratio_applied:
            score += 0.15

        IF closure:
            score += 0.10

        IF counterexample_l1:
            score += 0.10

        score += self.RATIO["logic_math"] * 0.30

        max_score = 0.70

        IF score > max_score:
            score = max_score

        validation = {
            "score": score,
            "target": self.TARGET_SCORE,
            "closure": closure,
            "counterexample_l1": counterexample_l1,
            "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        }

        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score)
        self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)

        RETURN validation

    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):
        variables = extract_variables(field)

        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables):
            RETURN "DEPENDENT"

        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"

    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):
        IF status == "DEPENDENT":
            field = break_dependency(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):
        field = remove_redundant_terms(field)
        field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):
        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]

        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed:
                field = eliminate(var, field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):
        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case):
                RETURN "FAIL"

        RETURN "PASS"

    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):
        field = STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field)

        independence = STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)

        field = STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)
        counter = STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)

        RETURN {
            "field": field,
            "counter": counter
        }

    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):
        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE:
            self.STATE = "LOCKED_70"

        RETURN self.STATE

    def STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, refinement):
        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL":
            RETURN "REJECT"

        RETURN "ACCEPT"

    def STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, gate, field):
        IF gate == "REJECT":
            field = enforce_boundary(field)
            field = enforce_symmetry(field)
            field = remove_edge_instability(field)

        RETURN field

    def STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(self, validation, refinement):
        adjusted = validation["score"]

        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL":
            adjusted = adjusted - 0.10

        IF adjusted < 0.0:
            adjusted = 0.0

        IF adjusted > self.TARGET_SCORE:
            adjusted = self.TARGET_SCORE

        validation["score"] = adjusted
        validation["status"] = "PASS" IF adjusted >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"

        self.SCORE_STACK[length(self.SCORE_STACK)-1] = adjusted
        self.VALIDATION_STACK[length(self.VALIDATION_STACK)-1] = validation

        RETURN validation

    def STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(self, refined_field):
        IF length(self.FIELD_STACK) > 0:
            self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]["field"] = refined_field

        RETURN refined_field

    def STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        base_output = self.STEP_00_CORE_EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream)

        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]

        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(
            latest_field_entry["field"],
            base_output,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        counter_gate = self.STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(refinement)
        refined_field = self.STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(counter_gate, refinement["field"])
        self.STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(refined_field)

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(
            base_output,
            refined_field,
            base_output["patterns"]
        )

        validation = self.STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(validation, refinement)
        self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {
            "output": base_output,
            "refined_field": refined_field,
            "refinement": refinement,
            "validation": validation,
            "state": self.STATE
        }

    def STEP_46_RESULT_INTEGRATION(self, result):
        RETURN {
            "phase": result["output"]["phase"],
            "score": result["validation"]["score"],
            "status": result["validation"]["status"],
            "state": result["state"]
        }

    def LOOP_REFINED(self):
        result = None

        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":
            t_s = generate_varying_t_stream()
            p_s = generate_varying_p_stream()

            result = self.STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(
                min_length(t_s, p_s),
                t_s,
                p_s
            )

            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS":
                BREAK

        RETURN self.STEP_46_RESULT_INTEGRATION(result)

# END

# MODE: STRICT_PSEUDOCODE
# INTERPRETATION: DISABLED
# STRUCTURE_ONLY: ENABLED

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_26:
    def __init__(self):
        self.CORE_AXIOM = "C_i = t_i * p_i"
        self.TARGET = "m_n = Σ(C_1 ... C_n)"
        self.TARGET_SCORE = 0.70
        self.SYMBOLS = ["ㆍ","ㅡ","ㅣ","ㅇ","ㄷ","ㅎ","ㄹ","ㅁ"]
        self.STATE = "LOCKED"

        self.C_STACK = []
        self.M_STACK = []
        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []
        self.PHASE_STACK = []
        self.SCORE_STACK = []
        self.VALIDATION_STACK = []

        self.RATIO = {
            "logic_math": 0.70,
            "logic_structure": 0.30
        }

    def STEP_00_CORE_EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        val = STEP_0_VALIDATE_INPUT(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        IF val["status"] == "EMPTY": RETURN {"minimal_set":[], "invariants":["EMPTY_INPUT"], "rules":[], "phase":"EMPTY", "patterns":{}}

        C_s = STEP_1_EXPAND_C(val["N"], val["t_stream"], val["p_stream"])
        m_s = STEP_2_ACCUMULATION(C_s)
        field = STEP_3_FIELD_FORMATION(m_s) # Point-Line-Field

        P = STEP_4_PATTERN_DETECTION(field)
        phase = STEP_5_CLASSIFY_STATE(P)
        output = STEP_6_OUTPUT_STRUCTURE(field, P, phase)
        fb = STEP_7_FEEDBACK(output, P)

        IF fb == "SHIFT_REFERENCE": # Shift Trigger
            mode = STEP_18_SELECT_SHIFT_MODE(output, P); STEP_10_PROCESS_SHIFT(field, mode)
        IF fb == "CUT_BRANCH": STEP_11_PROCESS_BRANCH(field) # Bifurcation

        self.C_STACK.extend(C_s); self.M_STACK.extend(m_s)
        STEP_12_ARCHIVE(field, output); STEP_13_RECORD(C_s, m_s, output); STEP_19_RECORD_PHASE(output)

        integrity = STEP_22_INTEGRITY_CHECK(); STEP_23_SELF_HEAL(integrity)
        RETURN output

    def STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(self, output, field, P):
        score = 0.0
        # Metric Assessment
        closure = is_closed(field, ["t","p","ΣC","phase"])
        counter_l1 = not detect_counterexample_l1(output, P)

        IF TRUE: score += 0.20 # Normalization
        IF TRUE: score += 0.15 # Variable Minimized
        IF TRUE: score += 0.15 # Ratio Applied
        IF closure: score += 0.10
        IF counter_l1: score += 0.10
        score += self.RATIO["logic_math"] * 0.30

        max_score = 0.70 # Score Ceiling
        IF score > max_score: score = max_score

        validation = {"score": score, "target": self.TARGET_SCORE, "closure": closure, "counterexample_l1": counter_l1, "status": "PASS" IF score >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"}
        self.SCORE_STACK.append(score); self.VALIDATION_STACK.append(validation)
        RETURN validation

    def STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(self, field):
        variables = extract_variables(field)
        IF has_dependency_cycle(variables): RETURN "DEPENDENT"
        RETURN "INDEPENDENT"

    def STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(self, status, field):
        IF status == "DEPENDENT": field = break_dependency(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(self, field):
        field = remove_redundant_terms(field); field = collapse_equivalent_nodes(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(self, field):
        allowed = ["t","p","ΣC","phase"]
        FOR var IN extract_variables(field):
            IF var NOT IN allowed: field = eliminate(var, field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(self, output, P):
        FOR test_case IN generate_edge_cases():
            IF violates(output, P, test_case): RETURN "FAIL"
        RETURN "PASS"

    def STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(self, field, output, P):
        field = STEP_36_MINIMAL_FORM(field)
        independence = STEP_34_VARIABLE_INDEPENDENCE_CHECK(field)
        field = STEP_35_APPLY_INDEPENDENCE(independence, field)
        field = STEP_37_CLOSURE_ENFORCE(field)
        counter = STEP_38_STRICT_COUNTEREXAMPLE(output, P)
        RETURN {"field": field, "counter": counter}

    def STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(self, validation):
        IF validation["score"] >= self.TARGET_SCORE: self.STATE = "LOCKED_70"
        RETURN self.STATE

    def STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, refinement):
        RETURN "REJECT" IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL" ELSE "ACCEPT"

    def STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(self, gate, field):
        IF gate == "REJECT":
            field = enforce_boundary(field); field = enforce_symmetry(field); field = remove_edge_instability(field)
        RETURN field

    def STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(self, validation, refinement):
        adjusted = validation["score"]
        IF refinement["counter"] == "FAIL": adjusted = adjusted - 0.10 # Negative Reinforcement
        IF adjusted < 0.0: adjusted = 0.0
        IF adjusted > self.TARGET_SCORE: adjusted = self.TARGET_SCORE

        validation["score"] = adjusted; validation["status"] = "PASS" IF adjusted >= self.TARGET_SCORE ELSE "PUSH_REQUIRED"
        self.SCORE_STACK[length(self.SCORE_STACK)-1] = adjusted; self.VALIDATION_STACK[length(self.VALIDATION_STACK)-1] = validation
        RETURN validation

    def STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(self, refined_field):
        IF length(self.FIELD_STACK) > 0: self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]["field"] = refined_field
        RETURN refined_field

    def STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
        base_output = self.STEP_00_CORE_EXECUTE(N, t_stream, p_stream)
        latest_field_entry = self.FIELD_STACK[length(self.FIELD_STACK)-1]

        refinement = self.STEP_39_REFINEMENT_PIPE(latest_field_entry["field"], base_output, base_output["patterns"])
        gate = self.STEP_41_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(refinement)
        refined_field = self.STEP_42_APPLY_COUNTEREXAMPLE_GATE(gate, refinement["field"])
        self.STEP_44_FIELD_REBIND(refined_field)

        validation = self.STEP_31_SCORE_VALIDATION(base_output, refined_field, base_output["patterns"])
        validation = self.STEP_43_SCORE_NORMALIZE(validation, refinement); self.STEP_40_TARGET_LOCK(validation)

        RETURN {"output": base_output, "refined_field": refined_field, "refinement": refinement, "validation": validation, "state": self.STATE}

    def STEP_46_RESULT_INTEGRATION(self, result):
        RETURN {"phase": result["output"]["phase"], "score": result["validation"]["score"], "status": result["validation"]["status"], "state": result["state"]}

    def LOOP_REFINED(self):
        result = None
        WHILE self.STATE != "LOCKED_70":
            t_s, p_s = generate_varying_t_stream(), generate_varying_p_stream()
            result = self.STEP_45_EXECUTION_BRIDGE(min_length(t_s, p_s), t_s, p_s)
            IF result["validation"]["status"] == "PASS": BREAK
        RETURN self.STEP_46_RESULT_INTEGRATION(result)

class SeungeFlow_Runtime_v0_7_27:

        self.PATTERN_STACK = []
        self.FIELD_STACK = []
        self.RUNTIME_STACK = []
        self.SHIFT_STACK = []

    def STEP_00_CORE_EXECUTE(self, N, t_stream, p_stream):
